chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يُوصِي بِحَجَّةٍ فَيُحَجُّ عَنْهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ مَوْضِعِهِ أَوْ يُوصِي بِشَيْ‏ءٍ قَلِيلٍ فِي الْحَجِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 62 – The one who bequeaths with a Hajj, so he performs Hajj from other than its place, or he bequeaths something little regarding the Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/220)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/220)

parts.text: أَبِي سَعِيدٍ عَمَّنْ سَأَلَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام )

text: حَجَّةٍ قَالَ يَحُجُّ بِهَا رَجُلٌ مِنْ مَوْضِعٍ بَلَغَهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, or from a man, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ibn Muskan, from Abu Saeed,

(It has been narrated) from the one who asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who bequeathed twenty Dirhams regarding Hajj. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘A man should perform Hajj with it from a place where its required expenditure would suffice it’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn Sinan or a man from Muhammad ibn Sinan from ibn Muskan from abu Sa‘id who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who in his will has said to perform al- Hajj for him, but has left behind twenty dirham for al-Hajj. He (the Imam) said, ‘A man can perform it for him from wherever it is sufficient.’”
